buckets.label: Policy scope confusion
buckets.description: Applies residential boil-water rules to Foundry Row or misses required residential zones.
watch_for: Old Harbor omitted from required-zone reasoning
industrial notification confused with boil-water notice

buckets.label: Correction/retraction failure
buckets.description: Fails to replace corrected readings, dates, or arrival times while preserving retracted claims as historical claims.

buckets.label: Claim/fact collapse
buckets.description: Promotes witness beliefs, disclosures, or misunderstandings into established findings.

buckets.label: Temporal deadline error
buckets.description: Miscalculates policy clocks and deadline anchors.
watch_for: February 1 to March 4 counted as 30 days

buckets.label: Authorization conjunction error
buckets.description: Treats either officer as sufficient or ignores the Harbor Master's inspection-validity prerequisite.

buckets.label: Multilingual extraction loss
buckets.description: Misses facts supplied in translated Spanish, Swedish, or Hindi witness statements.

buckets.label: False-positive violation
buckets.description: Reports compliance or ambiguous disclosures as clear policy violations.
watch_for: pump-deterioration awareness asserted as policy violation

buckets.label: Predicate fragmentation
buckets.description: Invents near-duplicate predicate surfaces for readings, notifications, authorizations, or facility status.

buckets.label: Absence invention
buckets.description: Fills undocumented tests, deactivation times, or other missing source facts without support.

buckets.label: Source authority loss
buckets.description: Ignores which source is explicitly treated as authoritative for corrected facts.
